title: Mio's Festival Traditions Ledger
content: Mio keeps a traditions ledger inherited from her grandmother. It records lantern folding patterns, stall placements, song orders, volunteer names, weather notes, and small rituals such as lighting the first lantern from the tea shop hearth. Mio believes traditions survive only when people understand why they matter. She worries about modernization, but she is not against change; she wants every change to protect the feeling of being welcomed under the same lantern-lit sky.
